item.title: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍Kim Bradford - Public Disclosure Commission
item.description: Kim Bradford signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Public Disclosure Commission.

item.description: Conner Edwards signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Professional Campaign Treasurer, CG Edwards PLLC. They are a registered lobbyist.
